overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, beginning inside a retro-futuristic diner and transitioning to an outdoor desert walkway. The player observes an NPC across the table before standing up and exiting the building to explore a dusty, overcast settlement in the Badlands.

events.description: pedestrians walk past outside the window visible through the glass

agents.ego_description: seated at diner table observing the interior and the person across while occasionally glancing out the window

notable_agents.action: sitting across the table drinking from a green cup

dark wooden table with condiment holder and green bottle
rotating ceiling fan with integrated lighting
long wooden bar with stools and backlit shelving

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a retro-futuristic diner, seated at a booth with red vinyl seating. Across the table sits an NPC drinking from a green cup, while outside the window pedestrians walk by in the desert haze. The camera pans to show the bar area and neon signs visible through the windows.

events.description: stands up from the booth and begins walking toward the exit
approaches the glass exit door with view of desert outside

agents.ego_description: walking through the diner toward the exit, passing by booths and a seated patron

notable_agents.action: person in blue and yellow jacket sitting at a table near the window

entered.detail: neon sign reading 'SUNSET' in yellow letters above the exit
large American flag hanging on the wall near the counter
green vending machine labeled 'BURRITO XXL' with food images
glass door with metal frame leading to the exterior walkway

segments.scene_description: The player stands up and walks through the diner interior toward the exit. The camera passes a neon 'SUNSET' sign and an American flag on the wall, approaching a green vending machine and the glass exit door that reveals the dusty desert landscape beyond.

events.description: exits the diner into the covered outdoor walkway with desert vista
passes by an NPC leaning on the railing while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered outdoor walkway, observing the desert landscape and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in white outfit leaning on the safety railing looking at the desert view
person standing against the building wall near a vending machine

entered.detail: weathered concrete pedestrian walkway with scattered debris
black metal railing along the walkway edge overlooking the desert
distant desert mountains under overcast hazy sky
green vending machine mounted on the exterior building wall
blue arcade cabinet with colorful graphics and illuminated screen

segments.scene_description: Exiting the diner, the scene transitions to a covered concrete walkway along the building's exterior. The desert mountains are visible in the hazy distance beyond the metal safety railing. Several NPCs stand along the path, including one in white leaning on the railing, while the player passes vending machines and an arcade cabinet.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert overlook with city vista

events.description: turns the corner at the end of the walkway entering the overlook area
reaches the open overlook with view of distant city towers and desert road

agents.ego_description: walking along the overlook area, taking in the view of the distant city and desert road below

notable_agents.action: person standing at the overlook railing with hands on hips observing the vista

entered.detail: green recycling bin with white recycling symbol
stack of cardboard boxes next to the recycling bin
futuristic city buildings with red neon lights visible in the far distance
electrical transmission towers and power lines stretching across the desert

segments.scene_description: Turning the corner at the end of the walkway, the scene opens into a wide overlook area exposed to the overcast sky. A green recycling bin and cardboard boxes sit near the wall, while the railing provides a view of the desert road below and distant city towers with neon lights. An NPC stands at the railing observing the vast desert vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the intimate, neon-lit interior of a retro-futuristic diner out into a vast, overcast desert settlement. It begins seated at a red vinyl booth facing an NPC with a green cup, before the camera pans across the bar and neon signs toward the exit. As the player stands and walks through the diner, the view passes an American flag and a neon SUNSET sign, moving past a green vending machine toward the glass doors. The scene then shifts to a covered concrete walkway where the interior warmth is replaced by a hazy desert atmosphere, passing arcade cabinets and NPCs leaning against a metal railing. Finally, the camera turns a corner to open onto a wide overlook, revealing a vista of cardboard boxes, a distant desert road, and glowing city towers under a gray sky.
